channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Soname rewards Nigeria U17 Flamingos with N4.5m after 11–0 aggregate win over Guinea
item.description: Nigeria U17 women’s national team, the Flamingos, don receive a cash reward of N4.5 million from Remo Stars and Beyond Limits Football Club owner, Hon. Kunle Soname, after their impressive performance...

item.title: Government plans to reduce toll exemptions on national highways, may remove some official categories
item.description: The central government is considering a revision of the existing rules governing toll exemptions on national highways, with a view to reducing the number of categories currently exempted. As per avail...

item.title: Sydney and Melbourne property values decline amid economic pressures; Trump updates Iran peace deal terms
item.description: On June 1, 2026, several significant developments were reported in Australia and internationally. Property prices in Sydney and Melbourne have sharply declined, with higher interest rates, affordabili...

item.title: Rising global temperatures are increasing heat risks for Hajj pilgrims in Mecca, study warns
item.description: A new analysis warns that climate change is significantly increasing the risks faced by millions of Muslim pilgrims attending the annual Hajj pilgrimage in Mecca. According to the report, global warmi...

item.title: Crinums remain unbeaten as Telkom Netball League semi-finalists are confirmed
item.description: The Telkom Netball League has reached a crucial stage following the conclusion of Power Week 2 at Ellis Park Arena in Johannesburg, where semi-finalists in both Division 1 and Division 2 were official...

item.title: DSS arrests arms couriers linked to Niger school attack, recovers rifles and ammunition
item.description: The Department of State Services (DSS) has arrested five suspects believed to be involved in supplying arms to gunmen responsible for the attack on St Mary’s Catholic School in Papiri, Niger State. Am...

item.title: OCTA survey shows strong public support for holding impeachment trial for Sara Duterte
item.description: An OCTA Research survey revealed that nearly three out of four Filipinos support the conduct of an impeachment trial involving Vice President Sara Duterte. The findings, published by ABS-CBN News on J...

item.title: Jerome Powell Warns Political Interference in the Federal Reserve Threatens Public Confidence
item.description: Former Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell warned that politicizing the U.S. central bank could seriously undermine public trust in key democratic institutions. Speaking in prepared remarks while acce...

item.title: Kitchener Rangers hold 3–1 lead heading into third period of Memorial Cup Final
item.description: The Kitchener Rangers are competing in a high-stakes Memorial Cup Final, entering the third period with a 3–1 lead. The matchup represents one of the most important moments in junior hockey, with the ...

item.title: Profile of Rep. Jinky Luistro and her role as lead prosecutor in the impeachment case vs VP Sara Duterte
item.description: Congresswoman Jinky Luistro has emerged as one of the prominent figures in the Philippine House of Representatives after taking on a key role in high-profile investigations and impeachment proceedings...

item.title: CPKC implements contingency plans as signals workers strike across Canada
item.description: Canadian Pacific Kansas City Ltd. (CPKC) faces a strike involving nearly 300 signals workers represented by the International Brotherhood of Electrical Workers (IBEW). The workers, who handle installa...

item.title: Lions learn valuable lessons despite heavy URC quarter-final loss to Leinster
item.description: The Lions faced a tough lesson in Dublin on Saturday, suffering a heavy 59-10 defeat against defending United Rugby Championship champions Leinster in their first-ever knockout match in the competitio...

item.title: Minnesota Republican convention includes moment of silence for Derek Chauvin, sparking criticism
item.description: The Minnesota Republican Party has come under criticism after reportedly opening its endorsement convention with a brief moment of silence for Derek Chauvin, the former Minneapolis police officer conv...

item.title: Wall Street Journal criticizes Republicans for lack of response to Democrats' Supreme Court plans
item.description: The Wall Street Journal's conservative editorial board has sharply criticized the Republican Party for appearing inactive as Democrats signal their plans for significant changes if they win back the H...

item.title: Consultant doctor booked under POCSO for alleged sexual assault of minor patient in Haryana hospital
item.description: A serious case has emerged from Kurukshetra, Haryana, where a consultant doctor at Lok Nayak Jai Prakash (LNJP) District Civil Hospital has been accused of sexually assaulting a 15-year-old patient. A...

item.title: Radio executive suspended after inappropriate on-stage contact with presenter at Australian Audio Awards
item.description: A regional Australian radio executive has been stood down after an incident at the Australian Audio Awards in Sydney, where he allegedly made inappropriate physical contact with a colleague on stage i...

item.title: Winter Adventures on the NSW South Coast and Southern Highlands
item.description: The winter 2026 edition of Eat Play Stay invites travellers to explore the NSW South Coast and Southern Highlands during the quieter months. Readers are encouraged to savour the seasonal arrival of tr...

item.title: Dua Lipa and Callum Turner wed in intimate London civil ceremony ahead of Italian celebrations
item.description: Dua Lipa and Callum Turner have officially married in a private civil ceremony held at London’s Old Marylebone Town Hall. The couple, who have been in a relationship since January 2024 and became enga...

item.title: Behind-the-scenes portraits of Claudia Cardinale during the filming of 'Circus World' (1964)
item.description: The article showcases a curated set of 35 behind-the-scenes photographs of Italian actress Claudia Cardinale taken during the production of the 1964 adventure film 'Circus World,' directed by Henry Ha...

item.title: Ferrari Luce EV: Market Demand and Industry Updates on Transportation Technology
item.description: TechCrunch Mobility reports on recent developments in the transportation and EV sectors, focusing on Ferrari's new all-electric car, the Luce. Despite negative public reaction and comparisons to lower...
